quote_text: I am capable of making the next right choice for myself.
caption:

quote_text: My progress isn't a straight line. I am still moving in the right direction.

quote_text: I can accept help without feeling like a burden. It is a sign of strength.

quote_text: I will do the deed that does not bring regret, whose result I can receive gladly.
caption:
Let this moment guide the next action.

A simple, steady choice today can become peace you get to receive tomorrow.

quote_text: I notice the urge without becoming it.
caption:

quote_text: I extend kindness to myself, not because I have earned it, but because I need it.
caption:

quote_text: My mind will hurry. My body can stay right here, in this slow and steady breath.
caption:

quote_text: One watchful day is better than a thousand days spent wishing for a cure.
caption:

quote_text: I stay with the discomfort. This is the practice of true resilience.
caption:

quote_text: Healing isn't linear. There will be good days and hard days. Approach each one with patience and self-compassion.
caption:

quote_text: This morning, I practice radical acceptance. I let go of resistance and accept the present.
caption:

quote_text: Gratitude shifts focus from lack to abundance. See the good around you.

quote_text: You are stronger than your attachments. Let go and find your inner peace.

quote_text: Awareness of my current blessings dissolves the urge to escape reality.

quote_text: Stillness is not empty. It is where clarity begins.

quote_text: Today I can accomplish my aims without being forceful.

quote_text: Let this day be soft. A gentle unfolding, not a struggle.

quote_text: Stillness is not the absence of noise. It is not reacting to noise as if it were an emergency.
caption:
